title: Website Cookie Consent Notice
overview: A notice informing users that the website uses cookies and requesting consent.
detailed_summary: At the bottom of the page, a cookie policy banner informs visitors that cookies are used to improve the experience. Users are asked to click “accept” to consent to cookie usage. The banner includes a link to the Cookies policy.
content:
This website uses cookies to improve your experience. To consent for cookies to be used, click accept.
Cookies policy ACcEPT
search_queries: how to accept cookies on the site
do I need to click accept for cookies
common_questions: What does the cookie banner mean?
How do I give consent for cookies?
Where can I read the cookies policy?
can_answer: What is the cookie consent message on the page?
warnings: Do not ignore the cookie consent; it is required for compliance.
